positive: A stylized, symmetrical depiction of a mythical forest creature intertwined with celestial elements, rendered in a high-contrast Art Nouveau and sacred geometry style. The central subject is a graceful deer/stag silhouette, its antlers adorned with blooming bioluminescent flowers and spiraling cosmic nebulae. The surrounding negative space features delicate, stylized geometric patterns resembling leaf veins and constellation maps. Use a limited, deeply saturated color palette dominated by midnight blues, emerald greens, rich golds, and ethereal lavender. The composition must be perfectly centered and highly balanced, designed as a clean vector print for apparel. Dramatic, soft backlighting emphasizes the outlines and silhouetted forms, giving the artwork a premium, mystical, and modern decorative feel. Crisp lines, perfect composition, high detail.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, signature, logos, trademarks, low quality, disfigured, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grayscale, photographic, photo, photorealistic
